emails.subject: FEA announces the release of @ENERGY 2.0
emails.body: Zimin, Please, take a look at it. I think we should download the update. Vince Forwarded by Vince J Kaminski/HOU/ECT on 01/31/2001 11:21 AM "Michelle Mendoza" <michelle@fea.com> on 01/26/2001 02:33:14 PM

emails.subject: Re: FEA announces the release of @ENERGY 2.0
emails.body: Re: FEA announces the release of @ENERGY 2.0 Vince and Stinson, I have successfully downloaded the @energy2.0. I am working with IT to update the license before we can use the software. Zimin Vince J Kaminski 01/31/2001 11:20 AM
